name: io.github.burakaydinofficial/searxng-deepdive
description: MCP server for SearXNG with engine targeting, multi-page fanout, and HTML→Markdown URL reading.

environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the SearXNG instance (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7979/). Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8080 if unset; set this to the address of your running SearXNG.
